loving family side.

educated until moving Syracuse nine.
attended Syracuse Public Schools, graduating Henninger School where played football, shotput (track field).
named State First Team-Class 1977.
study Hobart College.
member Jerusalem Missionary Baptist Church, Cummings, where served Deacons Board, Trustees Board, Missionary Department, former Sunday School Teacher Youth Department.
formerly employed Upstate University Hospital thirty-eight years until retiring July, 2018.
passionate about serving Lord; served fervently.
